reviews.comment:
Pésima la atención lerdos para atender sino  sos socio ni un vidrio te limpian  nunca saben quién llego primero así que te atienden cuando se acuerdan ..ni buen día te dicen...un desastre!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
The service is terrible, they're slow to help unless you're a member, they won't even clean a window, they never know who arrived first so they serve you whenever they remember... they don't even say good morning... a disaster!!!!!

reviews.comment:
La carga de combustible es más o menos rápida los baños no muy higiénicos y el acceso yendo de santafe a córdoba es incómodo porque hay que cruzar una ruta con mucho tránsito y no hay semáforo que permita el cruce

(Translated by Google)
Refueling is relatively quick, the restrooms are not very hygienic, and access from Santa Fe to Córdoba is inconvenient because you have to cross a busy road and there's no traffic light to allow the crossing.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3904387536841865428/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2MUtYbDF3RRAB
